title: Ultra-Processed Plant Foods Erase the Health Benefits of Eating Plants. A 30-Year BMJ Study.
description: A landmark 30-year BMJ cohort study reveals that ultra-processed plant-based foods increase cardiovascular and all-cause mortality risk — erasing the health benefits of plant eating entirely. The processing method matters as much as the ingredient. Here's what the $8 billion plant-based food industry doesn't want you to read.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Plant-Based Food Industry Has a Dirty Secret. A 30-Year Study Just Exposed It.
